ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "muscle_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the muscle group the exercise targets */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exercise */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video demonstrating the exercise */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* List of equipment required for the exercise */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "calories_burned_per_minute" REAL /* Estimated calories burned per minute during the exercise */,
  "is_bodyweight" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the exercise is a bodyweight exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercises_muscle_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("muscle_group_id") REFERENCES muscle_groups ("muscle_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "muscle_groups" (
  "muscle_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each muscle group */,
  "muscle_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the muscle group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the muscle group */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of training for the muscle group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("muscle_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, client, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Current fitness level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_routines" (
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout routine */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who created the routine */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the routine is assigned to */,
  "routine_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout routine */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the routine */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the routine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the routine (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "frequency_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of times the routine should be performed per week */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the routine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_routines_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_routines_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routine_exercises" (
  "routine_exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise in a routine */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets recommended for the exercise */,
  "reps" TEXT /* Repetitions range for the exercise */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Recommended weight in kilograms */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the exercise */,
  "rest_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Recommended rest time between sets */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the exercise is optional in the routine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("routine_exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routine_exercises_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES workout_routines ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routine_exercises_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (client) who performed the workout */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "sets_completed" INTEGER /* Number of sets completed */,
  "actual_reps" TEXT /* Actual repetitions performed */,
  "actual_weight_kg" REAL /* Actual weight used */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the workout */,
  "rest_time_taken_minutes" INTEGER /* Actual rest time taken between sets */,
  "heart_rate_bpm" INTEGER /* Heart rate during the workout */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the user after the workout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_logs_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES workout_routines ("routine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_logs_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (client) who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., muscle gain, fat loss, strength improvement) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value towards the goal */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of progress tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (client) providing feedback */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer receiving feedback */,
  "routine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or comment provided by the client */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client for the routine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_routine_id FOREIGN KEY ("routine_id") REFERENCES workout_routines ("routine_id")
)
